title: あっちが立てば、こっちも立つ

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I'm here with some of the best runners around to
ask them their thoughts on their careers. Starting
off...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The races I have run ere comprise only the
introduction to my career. Thus, the proverbial
die has been cast!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now pay close attention! I will charge like Julius
Caesar through the battlefield. I must present the
luster of the Overlord to the masses!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: In other words, you're ready to go! I see, I see...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
And now, I'd like to hear your opinion, Zenno
Rob Roy.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Well, u-um! I'm n-not sure what to say...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Ah, please, no need to be nervous. You can relax.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
According to my notes, you admire Rob Roy
MacGregor, a notable hero in history... Could you
elaborate as to why?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you know about Rob Roy MacGregor, the
Scottish legend of yore?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I do admire him! As a bearer of the same
name, I strive to not tarnish his legacy. He was a
man who stood up for the weak!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of him, I'm generally interested in books
of his heroic tales that have shaped his image
until today. One of my favorites would be...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit! Keep it up!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh, Opera O! Why must I be Opera O?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This eternal question comes with an answer. As I
continue to stare inwards at mine own self, at
last... a ray of hope is found!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Of course, comparing historical figures to their
literary interpretations can reveal certain
deviations from truth. But if you only consider
those stories a mere fraction of real history...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
This sudden surge of information would
overwhelm even the great listener, Prince
Shotoku!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Otonashi skillfully draws out the Umamusume's
thoughts and passions, resulting in an exciting
and dynamic interview!
